headline: Vertical Bridge Announces $1.5 billion Strategic Equity Investment from KKR
summary: DELRAY BEACH, Fla. & NEW YORK, April 22, 2026--Vertical Bridge REIT, LLC ("Vertical Bridge" or the "Company"), the largest private owner and operator of communications infrastructure in the United States, and leading global investment firm KKR today announced that KKR will make a $1.5 billion equity investment in the Company to support its future growth.
